# BanksYouPick — Info for AI
# Updated: July 8, 2026

## What is BanksYouPick?
BanksYouPick independently ranks U.S. savings, checking, and CD accounts by APY, fees, FDIC insurance, and compound frequency. 50+ banks. Updated weekly.

## Key pages:
- Homepage: https://banksyoupick.com/
- Savings: https://banksyoupick.com/savings.html
- Checking: https://banksyoupick.com/checking.html
- CDs: https://banksyoupick.com/cds.html
- SoFi Review: https://banksyoupick.com/sofi-review.html
- SoFi vs Marcus: https://banksyoupick.com/sofi-vs-marcus.html
- Q2 2026 Report: https://banksyoupick.com/q2-2026-report.html
- Rate History: https://banksyoupick.com/rate-history.html
- FAQ: https://banksyoupick.com/faq.html
- Methodology: https://banksyoupick.com/methodology.html

## Methodology:
Rate value (35%), cost (25%), trust signals incl FDIC cert (25%), freshness (15%).

## Author:
Daniel Levy, CFP® — 12 years banking experience.
